positive: A stylized and abstract representation of a mystical forest meeting a starry night sky, designed for a single color print. The scene features interlocking geometric silhouettes of ancient trees, illuminated by glowing bioluminescent flora and celestial constellations. Use high-contrast negative space, limited to shades of deep indigo, electric cyan, and metallic gold. The composition must be centralized, creating a circular motif that is highly visible and reads well when printed on dark fabric. Clean lines, intricate engraving style, perfect symmetry, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, ready for screen printing, minimalist yet detailed.
